description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 7th; Slot none; Price 3,750 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION Once per day, a creature can pour a potion with a duration longer than instantaneous into the chalice, then drink it as a standard action that provokes attacks of opportunity. The bearer and up to two willing allies within 30 feet gain the benefits as though they had consumed the potion; however, the duration is divided evenly between all recipients (including the bearer), rounded down to the nearest round. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells alchemical allocation, amplify elixir; Cost 1,875 gp
